description: Use this API to change the value of a VAR of a load component model at a specified load or subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5. ierr = change_ldmodc_var(ibus, ltypname,id, name, mcomp, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_ldmodc_var(ibus, ltypname,id, name, mcomp, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus, owner, zone or area number. ignored when an all type load model is specified (unless an all type load model is specified). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: ltypname
parameters.description: Load type, or “ “ if the model is not applied to applied to “load type”subsystem. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Load identifier, or “*” if the model is applied to all loads in the subsystem. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: mcomp
parameters.description: Model component number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model (1 for var(l), 2 for var(l+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: model NAME is not a load component model.
no <subsystem type> type <load type> model for this id in tables for <subsystem type> IBUS.
no all type <load type> model for this id in tables.
<subsystem type> <load type> model for this id for <subsystem type> IBUS is aaa not xxx.
all type <load type> model for this id is aaa not xxx.
no VARs used in model NAME.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
invalid Component number Mcomp for <load type> Model <NAME> for <subsystem> IBUS, load id <ID>
invalid Component number Mcomp for <load type> Model <NAME> for <subsystem type> IBUS, load id <ID>
invalid Load Model <NAME>(5th and 6th chacaracters in Model Name must be BL/OW/ZN/AR/AL/LT).
VARs of only bus based (load type) models can be changed using this API.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
